targets.rawSQL: SELECT count(distinct user_id) as developers FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo()))

SELECT count(distinct session_id) as sessions FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo()))

SELECT coalesce(sum(cast(input_tokens as bigint)),0) + coalesce(sum(cast(output_tokens as bigint)),0) as tokens FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT round(coalesce(sum(cast(cost_usd as double)),0), 2) as cost FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT substr(user_id, 1, 16) as developer, count(*) as api_requests, count(distinct session_id) as sessions, round(sum(cast(cost_usd as double)), 4) as total_cost, sum(cast(input_tokens as bigint)) + sum(cast(output_tokens as bigint)) as total_tokens, round(avg(cast(duration_ms as bigint))/1000.0, 2) as avg_response_sec FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT substr(user_id, 1, 16) as developer, count(distinct session_id) as sessions, count(*) as total_events, min(event_timestamp) as first_seen, max(event_timestamp) as last_active FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY sessions DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT coalesce(terminal_type, 'unknown') as terminal, count(distinct session_id) as sessions FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) GROUP BY terminal_type

SELECT model, round(sum(cast(cost_usd as double)), 4) as cost FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' AND model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model

SELECT 'Input' as type, sum(cast(input_tokens as bigint)) as tokens FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' UNION ALL SELECT 'Output', sum(cast(output_tokens as bigint)) FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' UNION ALL SELECT 'Cache Read', sum(cast(cache_read_tokens as bigint)) FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request' UNION ALL SELECT 'Cache Created', sum(cast(cache_creation_tokens as bigint)) FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT round(sum(cast(cost_usd as double)) / greatest(count(distinct user_id), 1), 4) as avg_cost FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT round(cast(sum(cast(input_tokens as bigint)) + sum(cast(output_tokens as bigint)) as double) / greatest(count(distinct session_id), 1), 0) as tps FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT round(sum(cast(cost_usd as double)) / greatest(count(distinct session_id), 1), 4) as cps FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'

SELECT round(cast(sum(cast(cache_read_tokens as bigint)) as double) / greatest(sum(cast(cache_read_tokens as bigint)) + sum(cast(cache_creation_tokens as bigint)), 1) * 100, 1) as pct FROM ${athena_database}.logs WHERE year BETWEEN year(date($__timeFrom())) AND year(date($__timeTo())) AND month BETWEEN month(date($__timeFrom())) AND month(date($__timeTo())) AND day BETWEEN day_of_month(date($__timeFrom())) AND day_of_month(date($__timeTo())) AND event_name = 'api_request'
